title: HACCP INTERNAL QUALITY AUDIT (2 days)
subtitle: A 2-day HRD Corp-claimable quality workshop for applying HACCP internal quality audit requirements at work.
whyThisMatters: HACCP INTERNAL QUALITY AUDIT (2 days) helps quality, operations, and process teams translate HACCP internal quality audit into daily routines, evidence, and improvement habits. The session covers Organization/Time Management, Understand GMP/HACCP Requirements, and Codex Alimentarius HACCP Principles and Criteria so participants can support standards, audits, and process discipline with more confidence.
builtFor: Supervisors and process owners involved in compliance work
Employees who support audits, records, or continual improvement
walkAwayWith: Understand the key requirements and workplace expectations behind the topic.
Recognize how process discipline, evidence, and records support compliance.
Apply practical improvement habits to daily operations.
Participate more confidently in implementation, review, or audit activities.

modules.title: Codex Alimentarius HACCP Principles and Criteria

methodologyCaption: Participants connect standards and quality concepts to workplace examples through guided discussion, exercises, and practical review activities.
